name: Zombie Dying: Survival Days
author: Poki
description: The zombie apocalypse is upon us! Time to grab your guns and shoot some undead in Zombie Dying: Survival Days. In this shooter-action game, you take on the role of one of the survivors in a city overrun by zombies. Each day, multiple different missions await you; from saving a civilian to killing as many zombies as possible. Each completed mission earns you money, which you can spend on improving your weapons and character. You can also buy new equipment: there are over 15 different weapons and 4 unique characters to unlock! Also keep an eye out for the achievements. These bonus challenges can help you earn more money! Can you make it through the Survival Days and become the ultimate survivor? How to play Zombie Dying: Survival Days? Move with A/D or the Left and Right arrow keys! Use the Spacebar to shoot! Switch weapons with 1/2/3/4! Who created Zombie Dying: Survival Days? Zombie Dying: Survival Days was created by Art Industries. Play their other games on Poki: Stickman Crazy Box , Stickman Parkour 2: Lucky Block and Stickman Parkour Skyland ! How can I play Zombie Dying: Survival Days for free? You can play Zombie Dying: Survival Days for free on Poki. Can I play Zombie Dying: Survival Days on mobile devices and desktop? Zombie Dying: Survival Days can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
